'''thasatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roads|roads]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roads|roads]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thasatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæsæthæth|thæsæthæth]] || [[word:thæsæthæj|thæsæthæj]] || [[word:thæsæthæsh|thæsæthæsh]] || [[word:thæsæthæ|thæsæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thasasathath|thasasathath]] || [[word:thasasathaj|thasasathaj]] || [[word:thasasathash|thasasathash]] || [[word:thasasatha|thasasatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasathath|thasathath]] || [[word:thasathaj|thasathaj]] || [[word:thasathash|thasathash]] || [[word:thasatha|thasatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasafthath|thasafthath]] || [[word:thasafthaj|thasafthaj]] || [[word:thasafthash|thasafthash]] || [[word:thasafthaf|thasafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thasathatha|thasathatha]] || [[word:thasathaja|thasathaja]] || [[word:thasathasha|thasathasha]] || [[word:thasathaka|thasathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thasathath|thasathath]] || [[word:thasathaj|thasathaj]] || [[word:thasathash|thasathash]] || [[word:thasatha|thasatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thasathathal|thasathathal]] || [[word:thasathajal|thasathajal]] || [[word:thasathashal|thasathashal]] || [[word:thasathakal|thasathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thasathathatha|thasathathatha]] || [[word:thasathajaja|thasathajaja]] || [[word:thasathashasha|thasathashasha]] || [[word:thasathaka|thasathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thasathathan|thasathathan]] || [[word:thasathajan|thasathajan]] || [[word:thasathashan|thasathashan]] || [[word:thasathakan|thasathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thasathathaoro|thasathathaoro]] || [[word:thasathajaoro|thasathajaoro]] || [[word:thasathashaoro|thasathashaoro]] || [[word:thasathakaoro|thasathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
